ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout routine */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the workout routine */,
  "workout_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout routine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workout routine */,
  "workout_type" TEXT /* Type of the workout (e.g., strength, hypertrophy, endurance) */,
  "target_muscle_groups" TEXT /* Primary muscle groups targeted by the workout */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the workout (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workout was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the workout was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercises" (
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout routine that the exercise belongs to */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise */,
  "focus" TEXT /* Focus of the exercise (e.g., warm-up, strength, hypertrophy) */,
  "movement" TEXT /* Movement or action of the exercise */,
  "sets" INTEGER /* Number of sets for the exercise */,
  "reps" TEXT /* Number of reps or hold length for the exercise */,
  "rest" TEXT /* Rest period for the exercise */,
  "tempo" TEXT /* Tempo of the exercise */,
  "equipment_needed" TEXT /* Equipment required for the exercise */,
  "video_link" TEXT /* Link to a video demonstration of the exercise */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Estimated number of calories burned by the exercise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exercise was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exercise was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercises_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., personal trainer, client) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "fitness_goals" TEXT /* Fitness goals of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who completed the workout */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout routine that was completed */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the workout was completed */,
  "weight_lifted" REAL /* Weight lifted during the workout */,
  "reps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of reps completed during the workout */,
  "rest_taken" TEXT /* Rest periods taken during the workout */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the workout */,
  "calories_burned" REAL /* Estimated number of calories burned during the workout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_logs_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exercise_logs" (
  "exercise_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise log */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout log that the exercise log belongs to */,
  "exercise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exercise that was completed */,
  "weight_lifted" REAL /* Weight lifted during the exercise */,
  "reps_completed" INTEGER /* Number of reps completed during the exercise */,
  "rest_taken" TEXT /* Rest periods taken during the exercise */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the exercise */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the exercise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exercise_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES workout_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exercise_logs_exercise_id FOREIGN KEY ("exercise_id") REFERENCES exercises ("exercise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_clients" (
  "trainer_client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer-client relationship */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personal trainer */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was established */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_clients_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_clients_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assigned_workouts" (
  "assigned_workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assigned workout */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who was assigned the workout */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout routine that was assigned */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date the workout was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assigned workout (e.g., pending, completed, in progress) */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the workout was completed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assigned_workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assigned_workouts_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assigned_workouts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the personal trainer who gave the feedback */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who received the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the trainer (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
